testsuite.name: HomePage
testsuite.system-out: @navigate ?[1mScenario:?[22m Verify HomePage title is displayed ?[90m# src/test/resources/features/navigate.feature:5?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mUser launcher Chrome browser?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.HomePageSteps.user_launcher_Chrome_browser()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mUser opens ilcarro HomePage?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.HomePageSteps.opens_ilcarro_HomePage()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mUser verifies HomePage title is displayed?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.HomePageSteps.user_verifies_HomePage_title()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mUser closes browser?[39m ?[90m# com.ilcarro.stepDefinitions.HomePageSteps.closeBrowser()?[39m
